eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Elmore, ID; at 4:50 PM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 5:50 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: BRUSH FIRE BETWEEN N BILLY AND HWY 51 ABOVE GOLDSMITH PREPARE TO EVACUATE, WATCH THE FIRE AND EVACUTATE IF NEEDED
